projectDescription: An open-source AI code editor forked from VS Code that lets you bring your own API keys for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or run local models via Ollama — no subscription required.
keyFeatures: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) — use OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or local Ollama models
AI chat panel (Cmd+L / Ctrl+L) with multi-turn conversation history
Inline AI code editing (Cmd+I / Ctrl+I) with accept/reject workflow
Tab autocomplete with context-aware AI suggestions
Multi-agent system with Coder, Architect, and Debug specialized agents
AI code intelligence: review, explain, test generation, refactoring, documentation
Full VS Code extension compatibility via Open VSX registry
Vim mode, multi-cursor editing, and advanced navigation
Integrated terminal, Git integration, and debugging tools
MCP (Model Context Protocol) client for external tool integration
publicApiSurface: LLMClient — multi-provider AI client (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, DeepSeek)
CodeIntelligence — review(), explainCode(), generateTests(), fixCode(), refactorCode(), generateDocumentation()
WorkflowEngine — planning mode, Ask mode, self-healing agent execution
Agent — autonomous coding agent with ToolRegistry
MCPServer — Model Context Protocol client for external tools
GitIntegration — blame, diff, commit graph, branch visualization
DebugEngine — breakpoints, watch expressions, call stack navigation
